summary: An unpredictable transition side in a 4-2-3-1 / 4-3-3 — they won't overplay and can leak goals, but the quick breaks are dangerous.
style: 4-2-3-1 / 4-3-3 — wingers 1v1, fullbacks & CMs making underlapping runs, quick transition attacks; won't overplay.
strengths: Wingers in 1v1s with underlapping runners from fullback & midfield

keyPlayers.name: Don Deedson Louicius
keyPlayers.note: Pacey, direct dribbler — 4 goals in qualifying, 11 chances created

tactics: Keep it simple and break quickly, with wingers isolating defenders and runners underlapping. They won't overplay, but the defensive lapses make them volatile — and unpredictable.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
